creator: kentas@hush.com
text:
The openbox port fails when creating a package from the compilation.

gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/tmp/usr/ports/x11-wm/openbox/work/openbox-3.5.2'
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for openbox-3.5.2_2
===>  Checking if x11-wm/openbox already installed
===>   Registering installation for openbox-3.5.2_2
pkg-static: lstat(/tmp/usr/ports/x11-wm/openbox/work/stage/usr/local/share/locale/sr@latin/LC_MESSAGES/): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/tmp/usr/ports/x11-wm/openbox/work/stage/usr/local/share/locale/sr@latin/): No such file or directory
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 74

Stop in /basejail/usr/ports/x11-wm/openbox.
*** [install] Error code 1
